judgment.summary: Palantir delivers explosive growth and high margins but trades at an extremely expensive valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 0.33 beat the 0.28 estimate by 18.1%, with the next earnings date on 2026-08-03.
positives: Revenue growth of 84.7% and earnings growth of 325.0% — shows massive scaling.
Gross margin of 84.1% and profit margin of 43.7% — demonstrates elite operational efficiency.
Total cash of $8.03B vs $211.98M debt — provides a massive liquidity cushion.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $1.75B — indicates strong cash generation.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 150.48x and Price/Sales of 60.77x — indicates an extremely high valuation.
Price/Book of 42.87x — shows the stock is trading at a massive premium to its assets.
Debt/Equity ratio of 2.48 — suggests significant leverage.

news.paragraph: Palantir is experiencing significant downward pressure, with recent reports noting the stock is down 26% in 2026 despite broader market highs. While bearish sentiment is reportedly intensifying, unusual call option buying has also been observed, suggesting some traders may view the current price as a potential entry point. No specific imminent catalysts such as earnings or regulatory actions are mentioned in the recent headlines.
